summary: HR Management Module Complete Testing - All 18 backend API tests PASS (100%). Frontend HR Management page fully functional with all 6 tabs working: Dashboard, Employees, Onboarding, Leave Management, Performance, Reports. Auto-sync with CRM Staff accounts verified.

issues: Most test employees show 'terminated' status - this is from test cleanup (soft delete). Consider filtering terminated employees by default.

critical_code_review_comments: HR Employee auto ID generation works correctly (ASR1001, ASR1002, etc)
Auto-sync with CRM staff accounts verified - new HR employees appear in /api/admin/staff-accounts
Onboarding checklist tracks 6 items and marks onboarding_completed when all done
Leave management properly calculates total_days and updates employee leave balance on approval

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All 6 HR tabs accessible and functional

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed employees and leave requests during testing. Soft-deleted (marked as terminated) during cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: HR Management module fully tested. 21 employees in system (1 active, rest terminated from test cleanup). 2 pending leave requests visible. CRM staff sync working - employees created via HR appear in /api/admin/staff-accounts.

hr_dashboard.evidence: Returns total_employees, active_employees, on_probation, departments breakdown, salary overview, pending_leave_requests

hr_employees_list.evidence: Returns paginated list with filters for department and status

hr_employee_create.evidence: Auto-generates employee ID (ASR####), sets default status=probation, creates onboarding checklist, calculates probation_end_date

hr_crm_auto_sync.feature: Auto-sync HR employees to CRM staff accounts
hr_crm_auto_sync.evidence: New HR employees appear in /api/admin/staff-accounts with default password 'asr@123'

hr_employee_get.evidence: Returns single employee details, 404 for invalid ID

hr_employee_update.evidence: Updates employee fields, tracks status history, syncs changes to CRM

hr_onboarding_update.evidence: Updates onboarding checklist items, sets onboarding_completed=True when all 6 items done

hr_leaves_list.evidence: Returns leave requests with optional filters

hr_leave_create.evidence: Creates leave request, auto-calculates total_days, sets status=pending

hr_leave_approve.evidence: Approves/rejects leave, updates employee leave balance on approval

hr_performance.evidence: Returns performance data with leads_assigned, leads_converted, conversion_rate, total_revenue

hr_performance_update.evidence: Updates performance_rating, sets last_review_date, tracks performance_history

hr_reports_summary.evidence: Returns status_breakdown, department_breakdown, total_monthly_salary, average_salary, tenure_analysis

frontend_hr_dashboard_tab.evidence: Shows Total Employees (21), Active (1), On Probation (1), Pending Onboarding (19), Department Breakdown, Salary Overview

frontend_employees_tab.evidence: Shows employee cards with details, search by name/ID/phone, filter by department/status

frontend_add_employee_form.evidence: Complete form with Personal Info, Address, Employment Details, Salary, Emergency Contact, Documents sections

frontend_onboarding_tab.evidence: Shows pending onboarding tasks with checkboxes for each checklist item

frontend_leaves_tab.evidence: Shows leave requests with Approve/Reject buttons, status badges, date range, reason

frontend_performance_tab.evidence: Shows performance table with employee metrics

frontend_reports_tab.evidence: Quick Reports section and Performance Insights cards
